feed.title: WooJung
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: First TIL
entry.summary: Why am I trying to start writing TIL During the whole summer vacation, I was asking myself the whole time. How can I be more productive. I tried lots of methods to be more productive. I’ve attended the Summer semester to go to school daily and study. This turned out to be a bad idea. Like a regular semester, I just studied one or two days before the test. Even though I went to school daily. Ra...

entry.title: C++_Lecture04(From namespace)
entry.summary: Namespaces Namespace is a feature added in C++ and is not present in C. A namespace is a declarative region that provides a scope to the identifiers (names of functions, variables or other user-defined data types) inside it. But this long definition is too hard to understand the full meaning so I prepared some examples to explain what is namespace. #include "iostream" using namespace s...

entry.title: Operations on one matrix - part 2
entry.summary: Operations on one matrix Simple row operations Switching two rows You can switch any two rows in a matrix without changing the value of the matrix. Multiplying a row by a constant You can multiply any row in a matrix by any non-zero constant without changing the value of the matrix. We often call this value a scalar because it “scales” the values in the ro...

entry.title: Operations on one matrix - part 1
entry.summary: Linear Algebra Class In a previous post, I wrote that I was going to take React lectures, but as I became busy with the start of the class, my plans changed. I decided to take a new course in linear algebra, and I would like to summarize what I learned here. Prior to the lecture, I listened to a summary of the overall direction, and the matrix was the main topic. In the recent high school curr...

entry.title: Introduction to basic financial statement
entry.summary: Introduction to basic financial statement I’ll be reviewing basic financial statement with the example of Simon’s case. Below is the story of Simon. The idea of a statement of a value Non-current assets(Fixed Assets) These kinds of assets are long-term assets. Which value is evaluated by the price left after usage. I’ll give you an example. Look at the Personal circumstances...
